rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC VS. OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction And Exonerate Bond
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2016 line 1. Plaintiffs ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC, AVIGNON JULIAN, LLC, and Alice Tse's Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction And Exonerate Bond GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Preliminary injunction is dissolved and the bond is exonerated. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2016 line 2. Plaintiffs Victor Tung and Rong Hu's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complaint Hearing Required to address: (1) delay in bringing (a) Doe Amendment and (b) amendment; (2) failure to include all proposed amendments into the Notice of Motion, which only mentions Doe amendment and third cause of action; (3) for Plaintiff to identify specific facts learned in discovery (particular deposition or written discovery by page and line in transcript/number of interrogatory) and where those facts are included in the proposed First Amended Complaint (page and line number); and (4) prejudice in light of the pending summary judgment/adjudication motions and firm trial date of January 17, 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW KANE ET AL VS. LSL PROPERTIES, B14 DE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT LSL PROPERTIES, B14 DE, LLC's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to December 23, 2016 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 per the order of the Presiding Judge. CCP 170.6 Challenge to the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay.= (501/REQ)
